items.headline: Game Recap: Thunder 115, Lakers 110
items.description: The Thunder defeated the Lakers, 115-110, in Game 4 to complete the series, 4-0.

items.headline: Player of the Night - Donovan Mitchell - May 11
items.description: Player of the Night - Donovan Mitchell - May 11, 2026

items.headline: Play of the Day: Donovan Mitchell - May 11
items.description: Play of the Day: Donovan Mitchell - May 11, 2026

items.description: Dunk of the Night: Jaxson Hayes - May 11, 2026

items.description: Assist of the Night: Cade Cunningham - May 11, 2026

items.headline: Fantastic Finish: Thunder complete series sweep over Lakers
items.description: The Thunder make timely shots down the stretch as they complete a 4-game series sweep of the Lakers.

items.headline: LeBron James scores 24 with 12 rebounds vs. Thunder
items.description: LeBron James scores 24 points along with 12 rebounds in Game 4 vs. the Thunder

items.headline: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander puts up 35 points in Game 4 clincher
items.description: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander finishes with 35 points as the Thunder close out the Lakers in Game 4.

items.headline: Ajay Mitchell scores playoff career-high 28 points
items.description: Ajay Mitchell scores a playoff career-high 28 points in a Game 4 win over the Lakers.
